name: guitkx
description: Syntax highlighting + language intelligence for .guitkx markup (ReactiveUI for Godot). Markup completion/hover from the schema; embedded-GDScript intelligence forwarded to Godot's language server.

guitkx.godotLanguageServerPort.description: TCP port of Godot's built-in GDScript language server (Editor Settings > Network > Language Server). The engine default is 6005.

guitkx.enableGodotProxy.description: Forward embedded-GDScript completion/hover to Godot's language server (requires the Godot editor to be running with the project open).

scripts.package: npm run build && npm run bundle-server && vsce package --no-dependencies -o guitkx.vsix
scripts.deploy: npm run package && npm run publish && npm run publish:ovsx
